name: Black Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, combine 1 can of undrained black beans and water. Blend at high speed until smooth.
2. Spray a medium nonstick saucepan with Pam cooking spray.
3. Add the onion and garlic to the saucepan and cook until they are crisp tender.
4. Pour in the pureed bean mixture from the food processor.
5. Add the remaining drained black beans, red pepper, and cumin.
6. Bring the mixture to a boil.
7. Serve topped with yogurt and chopped tomato.
